name: Multiple Failed Logins to a Compliance Asset
notes:
This rule detects multiple login failures from Compliance Asset servers.

Tune the Compliance Definition Building Blocks as needed:
BB:ComplianceDefinition: GLBA Servers
BB:ComplianceDefinition: HIPAA Servers
BB:ComplianceDefinition: PCI DSS Servers
BB:ComplianceDefinition: SOX Servers

dependencies.name: Multiple Login Failures for Single Username
Multiple Login Failures from the Same Source
Multiple Login Failures to the Same Destination

conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following Authentication: Multiple Login Failures for Single Username, Authentication: Multiple Login Failures from the Same Source, Authentication: Multiple Login Failures to the Same Destination

when an event matches any of the following BB:ComplianceDefinition: GLBA Servers, BB:ComplianceDefinition: HIPAA Servers, BB:ComplianceDefinition: PCI DSS Servers, BB:ComplianceDefinition: SOX Servers
TD_list: APPLY Multiple Failed Logins to a Compliance Asset on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when an event matches any of the following Authentication: Multiple Login Failures for Single Username, Authentication: Multiple Login Failures from the Same Source, Authentication: Multiple Login Failures to the Same Destination

AND when an event matches any of the following BB:ComplianceDefinition: GLBA Servers, BB:ComplianceDefinition: HIPAA Servers, BB:ComplianceDefinition: PCI DSS Servers, BB:ComplianceDefinition: SOX Servers
RED_list: Event name: Multiple Failed Logins to a Compliance Asset
Event description: Multiple failed login attempts to a compliance asset.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Rule
This information should not contribute to the naming of the associated offense(s)
